title: Toomies E73414 Grandpa Pigs Splash & Pour Boat - 4 Pc Bath Time Peppa Removable Water Sprinklers & Spinning Paddle Wheelhouse Kids, 18 Months Or Above, Multicolor
features: PEPPA PIG BATH TIME FUN: Get set for hours of fun at bath time with Grandpa Pig’s Splash & Pour Boat, including squishy, soft-touch Peppa Pig and Grandpa Pig characters that double up as water squirters.

EXCITING WATER PLAY: This bath toy's separate sections let you pour water in a variety of different ways, from a sprinkle to a shower. Use them to spin the paddle inside the wheelhouse and watch it go round and round.
PUZZLE FUN: This toddler bath time toy can be split into three pieces for boat-building puzzle fun.
EXPLORING AND LEARNING: These colourful water toys explore cause and effect, help develop motor skills and build confidence around water.
COLLECT THEM ALL: Collect the wide variety of Peppa Pig bath toys from Toomies, including Bath Floats, Water Squirters and a range of other playsets.
THE PERFECT GIFT: The ideal birthday or Christmas gift for boys and girls aged 18 months or above. No batteries are required.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always supervise children during bath time. Inspect the toy regularly for any signs of damage or wear. Do not use if any parts are broken or missing. Ensure the toy is rinsed and dried properly after each use to prevent mold growth. Suitable for children aged 18 months and above.
